applications.performance: When used to form 3D PtₓMo₁₋ₓ@graphene nanosponge catalysts, the material shows overpotentials of 32mV and 97mV while producing H2 gas at a current density of 10mAcm-2 in 0.5M H2SO4 and 0.1M KOH, Tafel slopes of 32 mV/dec and 51 mV/dec and excellent durability (>5000 cycles in acid, >50,000 s in alkaline).
applications.comparative_advantage: Superior to commercial Pt/C catalyst in both acidic and alkaline media. Graphene dot wrapping provides protection against dissolution, corrosion, agglomeration and poisoning. Enables low-temperature synthesis (70°C) without surfactants or stabilizers.

feedback.label: Regular
feedback.expert_comment: Omission Error: The field 'carbon_dots -> general_info -> definition' contained 'Carbon dots (Cdots) that can be exfoliated into graphene dots (Gdots) and used as both a structure-directing agent and carbon source for wrapping three-dimensional PtMo nanosponge.' in the source text, but it was extracted as null/missing.
